title: Gloriously Smoky Ukrainian Pork Stew
description: A rich and smoky stew featuring tender pork, heavy cream, and a mother-sauce base, perfect for a cold winter's night, this keto-friendly dish is a hearty and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat and sear the pork pieces until browned on all sides.
Remove the pork from the pot and set aside, then add the chopped onion and cook until softened and translucent.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, tomato paste, and browned pork back to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until the pork is tender.
Stir in the heavy cream and continue to simmer, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed, then serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
